files.notes: This file contains multiple lesson sections that were merged together. The file appears to be cut off at the end during the Literature lesson about Alfred Tennyson. LESSON II appears to be just a header with no content, suggesting it may be a placeholder or the content was not included in this extraction. The lessons progress from Genealogy/Testimony to Work/Business to Book of Mormon study to Literature study.

files.notes: This file contains two distinct articles. The first is 'On the Watch Tower' by James H. Anderson, which is a current events commentary. The second is 'The Official Round Table' which contains various Relief Society organizational news and notes from the field. There are some running headers embedded in the text that should be stripped.
